title: ixora roxburghii
intro: Ixora roxburghii, also known as Jambu, is a flowering plant species in the Rubiaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. Ixora roxburghii has been traditionally used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The plant is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and can also be consumed as a juice or tea to harness its medicinal properties.
